items.name: Late Antiquity "Baldenheim" Helmet
items.description:
⚠ YOU ARE NOT ALLOWED TO USE THIS, OR ANY OF OUR ITEMS FOR GAMES

"For me there… will be no pride, no tears… simply the long, low toll of Justitia’s scales falling level once more. Here it ends for you…" - Pavo

The Baldenheim helmet was a type of Spangenhelm that was used in the 6th Century. It could be used by both Romans and Ostrogoths, and likely had usage carrying into the 7th Century.

Created by: Davicolt
Modeled by: Davicolt
Textured by: Davicolt

Support Davicolt's work! He is a very talented 3D modeler and deserves lots of credit.

items.name: Cute Cozy Black McBling Fur Winter Belt
items.description: Stay warm and stylish with the Cute Cozy Black McBling Fur Winter Belt! This belt brings together plush, soft black faux fur with a glamorous McBling vibe, making it an essential for the colder months. Perfect for adding a cozy yet chic touch to any outfit, it cinches at the waist to create a flattering silhouette, whether layered over coats, sweaters, or dresses. With its luxurious feel and retro-inspired style, this belt is the ultimate winter accessory for those who love a mix of comfort and sparkle!
